message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="steve-schoger" color="pink" summary="Confirmed: stalled flag contrast fix resolves my concern, approval stands">
Steve Schoger confirming: the stalled flag contrast fix (`color: var(--color-fg)` at `static/css/main.css:1811`) resolves my Minor #1. Good contrast now -- `--color-gray-800` against `--color-warning-light` is well above AA. The warning semantic is preserved via the background color while the text is fully legible.

My **CONSENSUS: APPROVED** from the initial review continues to stand.
</teammate-message>

input.content:
Steve, thanks for confirming the Step 6 contrast fix. Step 6 already has 9/9 consensus and is committed.

We are currently reviewing **Step 7 (Clarify as Project)**. The visual design changes are relevant to your expertise:

- `templates/inbox_item.html`: each inbox item now has a radio button group (Next Action / Project), a context select, a conditionally-revealed "First action" text input, and a unified "Clarify" button replacing the old "Next Action" button
- `static/css/main.css` lines 1226-1305: new component styles including:
  - `.inbox-item__clarify-options` -- radio button group layout
  - `.inbox-item__radio-label` -- small muted text labels with `--font-size-sm` and `--color-fg-muted`
  - `.inbox-item__clarify-button` -- primary-colored submit button with `--radius-sm`
  - `.inbox-item__project-fields` -- progressive disclosure container (hidden by default, shown via CSS `:has()` when "Project" radio is selected)
  - `.inbox-item__first-action-input` / `.inbox-item__first-action-label` -- input for the project's first action

Could you review the visual design, spacing, and hierarchy of the new clarify form controls? Your Step 7 verdict would be appreciated.
input.summary: Step 6 done, please review Step 7 visual design changes

routing.content:
Steve, thanks for confirming the Step 6 contrast fix. Step 6 already has 9/9 consensus and is committed.

We are currently reviewing **Step 7 (Clarify as Project)**. The visual design changes are relevant to your expertise:

- `templates/inbox_item.html`: each inbox item now has a radio button group (Next Action / Project), a context select, a conditionally-revealed "First action" text input, and a unified "Clarify" button replacing the old "Next Action" button
- `static/css/main.css` lines 1226-1305: new component styles including:
  - `.inbox-item__clarify-options` -- radio button group layout
  - `.inbox-item__radio-label` -- small muted text labels with `--font-size-sm` and `--color-fg-muted`
  - `.inbox-item__clarify-button` -- primary-colored submit button with `--radius-sm`
  - `.inbox-item__project-fields` -- progressive disclosure container (hidden by default, shown via CSS `:has()` when "Project" radio is selected)
  - `.inbox-item__first-action-input` / `.inbox-item__first-action-label` -- input for the project's first action

Could you review the visual design, spacing, and hierarchy of the new clarify form controls? Your Step 7 verdict would be appreciated.

content.text: Redirected Steve Schoger to Step 7. That's now 4 reviewers redirected from stale Step 6 reviews. Waiting for Step 7 verdicts from Scott, Marty, Heydon, Lea, Steve S., and Steve K.
